creator: sgs@pichove.org
text:
When starting jupyter-lab, the following error occurs:

    HTTPServerRequest(protocol='http', host='xxx.yyy.org', method='GET', uri='/api/kernelspecs?1667326613510', version='HTTP/1.1', remote_ip='127.0.0.1')
    Traceback (most recent call last):
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 581, in _build_master
        ws.require(__requires__)
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 909, in require
        needed = self.resolve(parse_requirements(requirements))
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 800, in resolve
        raise VersionConflict(dist, req).with_context(dependent_req)
    pkg_resources.ContextualVersionConflict: (Jinja2 3.0.1 (/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages), Requirement.parse('jinja2>=3.0.3'), {'jupyterlab-server'})
    
    During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
    
    Traceback (most recent call last):
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/tornado/web.py", line 1713, in _execute
        result = await result
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/jupyter_server/services/kernelspecs/handlers.py", line 64, in get
        kspecs = await ensure_async(ksm.get_all_specs())
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/jupyter_client/kernelspec.py", line 311, in get_all_specs
        d = self.find_kernel_specs()
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/jupyter_client/kernelspec.py", line 225, in find_kernel_specs
        from ipykernel.kernelspec import RESOURCES  # type: ignore
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/ipykernel/kernelspec.py", line 18, in <module>
        from .debugger import _is_debugpy_available
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/ipykernel/debugger.py", line 39, in <module>
        raise e
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/ipykernel/debugger.py", line 22, in <module>
        from debugpy.server import api  # noqa
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/debugpy/server/__init__.py", line 7, in <module>
        import debugpy._vendored.force_pydevd  # noqa
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/debugpy/_vendored/force_pydevd.py", line 36, in <module>
        preimport('pydevd', [
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/debugpy/_vendored/__init__.py", line 126, in preimport
        import_module(name)
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/importlib/__init__.py", line 126, in import_module
        return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level)
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/debugpy/_vendored/pydevd/pydevd_plugins/__init__.py", line 5, in <module>
        __import__('pkg_resources').declare_namespace(__name__)
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 3260, in <module>
        def _initialize_master_working_set():
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 3234, in _call_aside
        f(*args, **kwargs)
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 3272, in _initialize_master_working_set
        working_set = WorkingSet._build_master()
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 583, in _build_master
        return cls._build_from_requirements(__requires__)
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 596, in _build_from_requirements
        dists = ws.resolve(reqs, Environment())
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pkg_resources/__init__.py", line 800, in resolve
        raise VersionConflict(dist, req).with_context(dependent_req)
    pkg_resources.ContextualVersionConflict: (Jinja2 3.0.1 (/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages), Requirement.parse('jinja2>=3.0.3'), {'jupyterlab-server'})
